summary: Iteration 77: Verified three bug fixes - route fixes for /management/banquets and /management/pressing, notification linking navigation, and user-alerts API. All backend tests (12/12) passed. Frontend tests confirmed customer sidebar has 'Messages & Alerts' link, routes load correctly, and notification API returns proper id field.
critical_code_review_comments: Routes /management/banquets and /management/pressing correctly render BanquetManagement and LaundryManagement pages respectively (App.jsx lines 843-850, 826-833)
Customer sidebar correctly includes 'Messages & Alerts' link to /alerts (useSidebarMenu.js line 105)
GET /api/subscriptions/user-alerts returns alerts from subscribed operators with proper 'id' field (not _id)
GET /api/notifications/ returns notifications with proper 'id' field transformation (notifications.py line 54)
Notification click navigation implemented in Layout.jsx (lines 764-778) and Notifications.jsx (lines 52-70)
operator_alert/promotion notifications navigate to /alerts, ticket_reply to /support, promotion_pending to /admin/validation
seed_data_creation: Used existing test users and operator alert notification from West Region Tours
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: (1) /management/banquets renders BanquetManagement, (2) /management/pressing renders LaundryManagement, (3) Sidebar for customers includes 'Messages & Alerts' to /alerts, (4) Notifications API returns id not _id, (5) Clicking notifications navigates correctly based on type

route_fixes.sidebar_links: useSidebarMenu.js correctly maps Banquets to /management/banquets and Laundry to /management/pressing

notification_linking.dropdown_implementation: Layout.jsx notification dropdown onClick navigates to correct page

user_alerts_page.sidebar_entry: Customer sidebar has 'Messages & Alerts' link to /alerts
user_alerts_page.api_endpoint: GET /api/subscriptions/user-alerts returns alerts from subscribed operators

api_id_field_fix.notifications_api: GET /api/notifications/ returns 'id' field properly (line 54 transforms _id to id)
api_id_field_fix.user_alerts_api: GET /api/subscriptions/user-alerts returns 'id' field properly (line 500 transforms _id to id)
